# Boardroom Brewery

> Small-batch beer, natural-style wines, and hard seltzers with clean flavors. A modern South Bay taproom near LAX, built for great nights and private events.

## Business facts
- Business: Boardroom Brewery
- Location: El Segundo, CA
- Phone: (310) 510-6698 ext. 211
- Email: forchi@boardroomatarena.com
- Service area: El Segundo, CA, South Bay, Los Angeles
- Hours: Tuesday: 16:00-20:00 | Wednesday, Thursday: 16:00-21:00 | Friday: 15:00-22:00 | Saturday: 12:00-22:00 | Sunday: 12:00-20:00

## Contact
